failure_modes.cause: Invalid f-string braces or malformed embedded CSS/HTML
failure_modes.mitigation: Add smoke tests that generate dashboard from temp DB; keep changes localized

failure_modes.mode: Dashboard server starts but UI missing critical hooks
failure_modes.cause: Renamed or removed IDs/classes relied on by JS
failure_modes.effect: Live controls or pipeline console break
failure_modes.detection: pytest smoke test checks for required ids
failure_modes.mitigation: Do not change IDs; add tests asserting presence

failure_modes.cause: Max-height too small on some viewports
failure_modes.effect: User cannot see full list without scrolling
failure_modes.mitigation: Responsive max-height; keep overflow auto only inside panels
